findings.message: deno.json `license` field missing (must be `MIT` for alpha)
deno.json `description` missing
version is '1.0.0'; alpha cadence requires '0.0.1-alpha.0'
deno.json `publish.include` missing — `deno publish` ships everything by default and that leaks tests/scratch
deno.json `publish.exclude` should explicitly drop `**/*_test.ts`, `tests/`, `examples/`
deno.json compilerOptions.strict must be true
deno.json `tasks` missing `publish:dry-run` shortcut
mod.ts is 204 lines; convention cap is 200 — split into sub-entrypoints
mod.ts has 74 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
mod.ts lacks section comment headers — recommended for navigability
exported function 'safeValidateSchema' uses non-standard prefix 'safe' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'paginatedQuery' uses non-standard prefix 'paginated' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'offsetPaginatedQuery' uses non-standard prefix 'offset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'cursorPaginatedQuery' uses non-standard prefix 'cursor' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'notFound' uses non-standard prefix 'not' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'validationError' uses non-standard prefix 'validation' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'conflict' uses non-standard prefix 'conflict' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'unauthorized' uses non-standard prefix 'unauthorized' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'forbidden' uses non-standard prefix 'forbidden' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'combineConditions' uses non-standard prefix 'combine' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README.md missing
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
